applicability_notes: constraints: ['input must be rank-4 of effective shape [1,1,1,N] (1D data in last dim)', 'input layout ROW_MAJOR', 'outputs are padded to input width; valid region bounded by num_indices scalar', 'data-dependent output: not fusable downstream without a slice on num_indices']

placement_observations.source: unit test: ttnn.from_torch(torch_input_tensor, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device) / ttnn.Tensor(...).to(device) with default DRAM interleaved
unit test: mem_config = ttnn.MemoryConfig(ttnn.TensorMemoryLayout.INTERLEAVED, ttnn.BufferType.DRAM); ttnn.nonzero(input_tt, memory_config=mem_config)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: rank-4 [1,1,1,N] padded; valid prefix length = num_indices
placement_observations.source: unit test: ttnn.nonzero(input_tt, memory_config=mem_config) followed by ttnn.slice(indices_tt, (0,0,0,0), (1,1,1,num_non_zeros), memory_config=mem_config)
